div1.entryFree: Sum, vb. to compute, to cast up: this fair child of mine shall s. my count, Sonn. 2, 11. --ed the account of chance, H4B I, 1, 167. will you with counters s. the past proportion of his infinite? Troil. II, 2, 28. With up: whose grossness little characters s. up, Troil. I, 3, 325. Rom. II, 6, 34. Cymb. V, 4, 170.
